data.title: Why Is Pharma Giant Roche Stock Trading Lower On Wednesday?
data.description: Roche's MUSETTE trial found no additional benefit of high-dose Ocrevus over the 600 mg IV dose, reaffirming its efficacy and safety for relapsing multiple sclerosis.

data.title: BioMarin Seeks Label Expansion For Palynziq After Positive Phase 3 Results In Adolescent Patients
data.description: BioMarin's Phase 3 trial shows Palynziq significantly reduces blood Phe in adolescents with PKU. The company plans a regulatory submission for label expansion.

data.title: Trump's 'Liberation Day' Tariff Reveal Set For 4PM: What's At Stake
data.description: Trump to announce new trade tariffs, potentially reaching 20%, in a push to tackle US deficit. Wall Street reacts with caution and correction.

data.title: What's Going On With Innovation Beverage Shares Wednesday?
data.description: Innovation Beverage Group Limited (NASDAQ:IBG) stock is soaring on Wednesday after the company announced a distribution deal with Republic National Distribution Company (RNDC).

data.title: Tradeweb, Nasdaq, Virtu, ICE, BGC Group, Cboe Set To Benefit From IPO Comeback: Analyst
data.description: BofA Securities analyst maintains ratings and forecasts a high upside for Tradeweb, BGC Group, and Nasdaq. Expecting IPOs and growth in trading.
